TextENGNew: ``Hey, mom. Tell me. Why did you have a fight with the hag?@k@vS20/06/440600034. It was bad enough that she disowned you, right?``
``You're so nosy about everything... Well, I guess you're old enough to know.@k@vS20/16/442200002. She objected when I told her I wanted to marry your father.``
``I was living a very unseemly life back then. Then the man I brought home was a yakuza,@k@|@y@vS20/16/442200004. so of course she got terribly upset.

She said, 'the head of the family will choose your fiance,' and I said, 'screw your decisions, you fucking virago!' So then we both tried to cut each other down on the spot.@k@|@y@vS20/16/442200006. We unsheathed our katanas in the living room and clashed and slashed and sliced.@k@|@y@vS20/16/442200007. Aha ha ha ha!``
``Eeek...! You fought that hag with a sword?!@k@vS20/06/440600037. Way to go, Mom...``

``Well, I was into martial arts when I was young.@k@vS20/16/442200009. Both she and I held high ranks in kendo, so yes, it was quite the show.@k@vS20/16/442200010. Everyone nearby was terrified. Ah, that was fun.``
``I see...... so is that why you were disowned?``

``That's right. I was happy for it! I married your father right away.@k@vS20/16/442200012. Well, I was forced to remove my fingernails in atonement, though.@k@vS20/16/442200013. See how the fingernails of my left hand look ugly?``
``Wow... So, that's why you and the hag have a bad relationship, huh...?``
``Ahahaha, you know what, Shion? That's not actually true.@k@vS20/16/442200015. Our relationship is actually pretty good.``

``She has to maintain the family's reputation, so she can't treat me normally,@k@vS20/16/442200017. and accordingly, I lay low at the family councils.@k@vS20/16/442200018. But I visit her every now and then, and we have tea together.``
``This is just between you and me, okay? She removed her fingernails in atonement a long time ago herself.@k@vS20/16/442200020. Look carefully at her hand the next time you see her.``
``Beats me! I don't have a clue☆!``
``Hey, you do so have one! It's all over your face! Tell meee!``
